records.ety: [OF. enamourer, enamorer; pref. en- (L. in) + OF. & F. amour love, L. amor. See Amour, and cf. Inamorato.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Enamored (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Enamoring.]

defs: To inflame with love; to charm; to captivate; -- with of, or with, before the person or thing; as, to be enamored with a lady; to be enamored of books or science.
quotes: Passionately enamored of this shadow of a dream.
